text: Saute the onions until golden, then fold in the garlic and a pinch of salt.
Whisk the eggs with a splash of milk before pouring them into the hot pan.
Let the bread dough rise for an hour until it doubles in size.
Simmer the tomato sauce gently so it reduces and thickens.
Toast the spices in a dry skillet to release their aroma.
Rest the roast for ten minutes before carving to keep it juicy.
The derivative of sine is cosine, and the derivative of cosine is negative sine.
A prime number has exactly two positive divisors: one and itself.
The determinant of a two-by-two matrix is ad minus bc.
Integration by parts rewrites the integral of u dv as uv minus the integral of v du.
A vector space is closed under addition and scalar multiplication.
The limit of one over n as n grows without bound is zero.
